decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly deploying cheap artifacts and creatures to overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays. It utilizes mana acceleration from cards like Mox Opal and Springleaf Drum, while also using Urza's Saga to search for powerful artifacts like Cranial Plating and Shadowspear. With the ability to generate a large board presence quickly and disrupt the opponent with cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt, the deck aims to win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing the combo between Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker to generate incremental advantage and control the board. By utilizing various support cards like Kozilek's Command, Ancient Stirrings, and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to assemble the combo pieces quickly and efficiently. Emrakul, the Promised End serves as a powerful finisher, while cards like Blade of the Bloodchief and Malevolent Rumble help to protect the combo and disrupt opponents. The inclusion of Eldrazi Temple and various lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Cavern of Souls provide additional mana and protection for the combo pieces.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creature attacks with disruptive elements that slow down your opponent's game plan. By using cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker, you can control the tempo of the game while maintaining pressure with powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. Additionally, cards like Prismatic Ending and March of Otherworldly Light provide removal options to handle threats from your opponent. The deck aims to disrupt your opponent's strategy while setting up lethal attacks to secure the win.

This UR Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through countering spells and removing threats, while also generating card advantage with cards like Snapcaster Mage and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck aims to control the game by maintaining a strong board presence and utilizing powerful instant speed removal and counterspells. It also includes cards that allow for additional card draw and manipulation to ensure consistency in controlling the pace of the game. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent through strategic spell casting and board control.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Amulet of Vigor to generate explosive mana ramp and combo potential with Primeval Titan. By utilizing lands such as Urza's Saga and Gruul Turf in combination with bounce lands like Simic Growth Chamber, the deck can generate a large amount of mana quickly to cast powerful spells like Scapeshift or Malevolent Rumble. Additionally, cards like Aftermath Analyst and Vexing Bauble provide additional card advantage and utility to keep the deck running smoothly. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

The deck focuses on using land-based ramp and mana generation to quickly get out powerful threats like Primeval Titan and Amulet of Vigor. It aims to assemble the Amulet Titan combo quickly to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and lands. Utilizing cards like Arboreal Grazer and Scapeshift, the deck can quickly generate a large amount of mana and cast multiple spells in a single turn. The key strategy is to outpace the opponent by ramping up quickly and overwhelming them with powerful creatures and combo interactions.

This deck focuses on using creatures and spells that manipulate reality and disrupt opponents' strategies to create a powerful combo win condition without relying on lands. By utilizing cards like Hydroelectric Specimen, Tameshi, Reality Architect, and Thundertrap Trainer, along with key combo pieces like Lotus Bloom and Goblin Charbelcher, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents and win the game quickly. Cards like Disrupting Shoal, Sink into Stupor, and Whir of Invention provide disruption and protection, while cards like Sea Gate Restoration and Suppression Ray help draw into the combo pieces needed for victory.

This deck focuses on disrupting opponents while applying pressure with powerful creatures. By using cards like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek to strip away key cards from opponents' hands and cards like Solitude and Flickerwisp to control the board, it aims to maintain a strong board presence while keeping opponents on the back foot. The creatures in the deck are versatile and can be used both offensively and defensively, allowing for flexibility in adapting to different matchups. The deck's strategy revolves around taxing opponents' resources and overwhelming them with a steady stream of threats.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with a combination of efficient artifact creatures and powerful artifacts. It aims to establish a strong board presence early on using low-cost artifacts and mana acceleration, then top off the curve with powerful threats like Arcbound Ravager and Thought Monitor. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Sink into Stupor and Tormod's Crypt to disrupt opponents' game plans. Finally, the deck utilizes Urza's Saga to tutor for key artifacts and lands to further solidify its advantage.

The deck aims to assemble the combo of Amulet of Vigor, Primeval Titan, and lands like Urza's Saga to quickly generate mana and search for key pieces like Malevolent Rumble or Scapeshift to win the game. The deck utilizes lands that provide additional value such as Boseiju, Who Endures and Lotus Field to protect its combo and disrupt opponent's plans. By ramping quickly and efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful Titan creatures and game-ending spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards that allow for powerful combos and creative plays to disrupt the opponent's strategy and win the game. It includes cards that help with hand disruption, removal, and card advantage to set up the combo pieces, such as Indomitable Creativity and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker. The goal is to quickly assemble the necessary pieces to create a game-winning board state or combo that overwhelms the opponent. The mana base is designed to support the deck's requirements and provide the necessary color sources for the spells.

This deck aims to control the game with a mix of removal spells and ramping up to play powerful Eldrazi creatures. It utilizes cards like Sowing Mycospawn and Writhing Chrysalis for early game defense, while also aiming to ramp up quickly with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Talisman of Impulse to cast big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command to further control the game and protect its creatures.

This Grixis Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures. The deck aims to control the game by denying the opponent's resources with cards like Force of Negation, Unholy Heat, and Spell Snare, while also generating card advantage with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Mishra's Bauble. The deck's win condition is to outvalue the opponent with efficient threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, while maintaining control of the game with counterspells and removal spells.

This UW Control deck focuses on utilizing powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Narset, Parter of Veils to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy and card advantage. The deck also includes a variety of counterspells and removal spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to deal with threats efficiently. The inclusion of Companian Kaheera, the Orphanguard provides an additional creature and synergy with the rest of the deck. The deck aims to stall the game long enough to establish board control and win through incremental advantage.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Birthing Ritual and using low-cost creatures with powerful enter the battlefield effects to overwhelm the opponent. It also includes disruptive spells like Flare of Denial and Sink into Stupor to control the board. The deck aims to quickly establish board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a win through aggressive plays and tempo advantage. The use of Simic colors allows for versatility in threats and disruption, making it a strong aggro deck in the Modern format.

This deck focuses on using mill cards such as Hedron Crab, Ruin Crab, and Fractured Sanity to quickly mill the opponent's library, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Archive Trap and Surgical Extraction. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Drown in the Loch to control the board, as well as card draw effects like Visions of Beyond to help find key combo pieces. The goal is to out-mill the opponent and win through decking them out, while also having answers to their threats.
